case_title: TIKHONOVA, OLGA et al VS AAA MOVING SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-18-2005, OFF CALENDAR CASE RESET INORDER TO RENDER JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIKHONOVA, OLGA SEVERINOV, SERGEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AAA MOVING SERVICES $1,440.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,472.00, DEFT WAIVES NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFT SHALL RELEASE PLTF'S GOODS AFTER 1/3/05 BUT NO LATER THAN 1/14/05 @ NOON. CONTINUED UNTIL 1/18/05 AT 3:30 PM FOR PROGRESS ON EXCHANGE. (DEFT SHALL ACCEPT 110% OF ORIGINAL ESTIMATE OF 6/7/04. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: RE-SET WAS DONE IN ORDER TO PUT CASE ON CALENDAR FOR 1/18/05 @ 3:30 PM; SEE JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
